description_long: This rifle features a futuristic, angular design with a vibrant color scheme of purple, green, and black, accented by metallic orange details. The body is composed of a mix of smooth and textured surfaces, with a prominent, skeletonized stock and a robust, reinforced frame. The central section houses a rotary drum magazine, visible through the open side panels, suggesting a high-capacity, rapid-fire mechanism. The barrel is short and compact, with a squared-off muzzle and no visible muzzle device. The grip is ergonomically shaped, and the top rail appears to have a low-profile iron sight. The overall construction suggests a lightweight yet durable weapon, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A futuristic, angular rifle with a purple, green, and black color scheme, featuring a rotary drum magazine and skeletonized stock. The design is compact, robust, and visually striking, with metallic orange accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the rotary drum magazine, skeletonized stock, and vibrant color pattern.
description_view_1: Front view focusing on the muzzle, showing the compact barrel and the alignment of the iron sight along the top rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and ergonomic grip details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the stock and the top rail, emphasizing the rifle's angular frame and color transitions.
